actions: route SevenOS native panels as centered floating surfaces
common_keybinds: bind = $mod SHIFT, Return, exec, seven-terminal profile
bind = $mod CTRL, Return, exec, seven-terminal menu
bind = $mod, C, exec, seven shield mode
bind = $mod CTRL, W, exec, seven widgets menu
bind = $mod SHIFT, E, exec, seven-files menu
bind = $mod CTRL, E, exec, seven-files profile
bind = $mod SHIFT, L, exec, systemctl suspend || loginctl suspend
bind = $mod SHIFT, R, exec, sh -lc 'PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:$PATH"; seven-recorder area'
bind = $mod CTRL SHIFT, R, exec, sh -lc 'PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:$PATH"; seven-recorder full'
bind = $mod ALT, R, exec, hyprctl reload
bind = $mod SHIFT, F, exec, seven-window smart-maximize
bind = $mod ALT, SPACE, exec, seven-window toggle-float
bind = $mod ALT, L, exec, seven-window layout-menu
bind = $mod ALT, D, exec, seven-window controls-toggle
bind = $mod CTRL ALT, D, exec, seven-window controls
bind = $mod CTRL, right, exec, seven-workspace next
bind = $mod CTRL, left, exec, seven-workspace prev
bind = , Print, exec, seven-screenshot area save
bind = $mod, Print, exec, seven-screenshot full save
bind = $mod SHIFT, S, exec, seven-screenshot area edit
bind = $mod CTRL, S, exec, seven-screenshot area copy
bind = $mod SHIFT, C, exec, hyprpicker -a || true
bind = $mod SHIFT, I, exec, hyprsysteminfo || seven doctor check system
bind = $mod SHIFT, U, exec, seven hypr status
bind = $mod CTRL, C, exec, seven shield hud
bind = , XF86AudioMute, exec, wpctl set-mute @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ toggle
common_window_rules: windowrule = match:title ^(Open File)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(Select a File)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(Open Folder)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(Save As)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(File Upload)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(Preferences|Settings|Properties)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(About)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:class ^(pavucontrol)$, float on, center on, size 46% 46%
windowrule = match:class ^(nm-connection-editor)$, float on, center on, size 50% 58%
windowrule = match:class ^(blueman-manager)$, float on, center on, size 52% 58%
windowrule = match:class ^(org.gnome.Calculator)$, float on, center on, size 420 560
windowrule = match:class ^(org.gnome.Loupe)$, float on, center on, size 72% 72%
windowrule = match:class ^(org.gnome.Nautilus)$, float on, center on, size 78% 76%
windowrule = match:class ^(Nautilus)$, float on, center on, size 78% 76%
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalNative)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Terminal · .*)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalClassic)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalDark)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalLight)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalForge)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalCyber)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalWindows)$, float on, center on, size 820 500
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalFocus)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenTerminalAdmin)$, float on, center on, size 760 480
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenLaunchpadNative)$, fullscreen on
windowrule = match:class ^(seven-launchpad-native)$, fullscreen on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenSpotlightNative)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Spotlight)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenNotificationCenterNative)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Notifications)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenProfileCenterNative)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Profiles)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenShieldCenterNative)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Shield)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenWaybarCenterNative)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Welcome)$, float on, center on, size 900 600, opacity 0.94 0.88, rounding 28, border_size 1
windowrule = match:class ^(seven-app-menu-native)$, float on, pin on, size 336 310
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenSettingsNative)$, float on, center on, size 980 660, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Settings)$, float on, center on, size 980 660, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS .*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Launchpad)$, fullscreen on
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Desktop Menu)$, float on, center on, size 380 420, opacity 1.00 0.96, rounding 24, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Widgets)$, float on, center on, size 760 520, opacity 1.00 0.96, rounding 24, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Widgets Desktop)$, float on, move 2% 12%, size 420 560, opacity 0.99 0.94, rounding 26, border_size 0
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenQuickSettingsNative)$, float on, size 360 520, move 70% 10%
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Quick Settings)$, float on, size 360 520, move 70% 10%
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenFilesNative)$, float on, center on, size 700 500
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Files)$, float on, center on, size 700 500
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenReaderNative)$, float on, center on, size 1220 760
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Reader)$, float on, center on, size 1220 760
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenDockCanvas|SevenDockNative)$, float on, pin on
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Dock)$, float on, pin on
windowrule = match:class ^(SevenWindowControlsNative)$, float on, pin on, move 12 42, opacity 0.96 0.86, rounding 18, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Window Traffic Lights)$, float on, pin on, move 12 42, size 38 38, opacity 0.94 0.82, rounding 18, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Window Controls)$, float on, pin on, move 12 42, size 420 62, opacity 0.96 0.86, rounding 18, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Window Layout)$, float on, pin on, center on, size 330 250, opacity 0.96 0.90, rounding 20
windowrule = match:title ^(Seven Window Advanced)$, float on, pin on, center on, size 350 380, opacity 0.96 0.88, rounding 22, border_size 0
windowrule = match:class ^(seven-help-native|SevenHelpNative)$, float on, center on, size 1080 700, opacity 0.97 0.91, rounding 24, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Help|Aide SevenOS)(.*)$, float on, center on, size 1080 700, opacity 0.97 0.91, rounding 24, border_size 0
windowrule = match:title ^(SevenOS Migration)(.*)$, float on, center on
windowrule = match:title ^(Picture[- ]?[Ii]n[- ]?[Pp]icture)(.*)$, float on, pin on, size 25% 25%, move 73% 72%
windowrule = match:class ^(mpv)$, float on, center on, size 72% 72%
windowrule = match:class ^(vlc)$, float on, center on, size 72% 72%
windowrule = match:class ^(Spotify)$, float on, center on, size 54% 62%
launchpad_modal_binds: bind = , Escape, exec, hyprctl dispatch submap reset; pkill -f 'seven-launchpad-native' || true
bindr = $mod, SUPER_L, exec, hyprctl dispatch submap reset; pkill -f 'seven-launchpad-native' || true
bindr = $mod, SUPER_R, exec, hyprctl dispatch submap reset; pkill -f 'seven-launchpad-native' || true
title: Equinox Balance
window_rules: windowrule = match:class ^(SevenStoreNative)$, float on, center on, size 1180 740
